description: 1,350 agent tools + 46 skill packs. USDC on Base + 3 chains or USDG on Robinhood Chain. Free PoW.
name: io.github.MikeyPetrillo/agent402

environmentVariables.description: Hex private key of a wallet funded with USDC on Base (or Solana/Polygon/Arbitrum). Unset = proof-of-work mode (free pure-CPU tools).
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional hard cap on total USDC spent per session (e.g. 1.00). Refused before any payment is signed.
environmentVariables.name: AGENT402_BUDGET

environmentVariables.description: Optional max USD price for any single call (e.g. 0.01).
environmentVariables.name: AGENT402_MAX_PER_CALL

title: Agent402.Tools — pay-per-call web tools
